ogTitle: Hurstville Grove vs Hyams Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Hurstville Grove vs Hyams Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hurstville Grove, New South Wales and Hyams Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hurstville Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hyams Beach (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hurstville Grove or Hyams Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hurstville Grove has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Hyams Beach scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hurstville Grove scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Hyams Beach scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hurstville Grove or Hyams Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hurstville Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
